analysis: Good Cheer is definitely the horse to beat — and we are not taking a 6-5 horse straight up. I will try and beat her with either Quietside or Take Charge Milady.
betting_plays:
Quietside to Win $
Take Charge Milady to Win $

Exacta Box
Take Charge Milady, Quietside, Good Cheer (6 ways)

Separate Exacta
Good Cheer / Take Charge Milady $

Trifecta
Good Cheer, Quietside / Take Charge Milady / Good Cheer, Quietside, Simply Joking, La Cara (6 ways)

horses.name: La Cara
horses.note: hot and improving; distance will only help

horses.name: Take Charge Milady
horses.note: good mud experience, closer in a fast race

horses.name: Good Cheer
horses.note: heavy favorite 6-0; brutal odds but has won each race

horses.name: Quietside
horses.note: strong resume; gave Good Cheer her best race in 2024

horses.name: Drexel Hill
horses.note: only a maybe because of the long odds

horses.name: Quickick
horses.note: won't win, but room for improvement

horses.name: Tenma
horses.note: great until barely winning last race; if last was a hiccup, win contender at a price
